rationale: Section 11.435 governs late applications for charitable organization exemptions under §11.18, which is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b). No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The chief appraiser shall accept and approve or deny an application for a charitable organization exemption under Section 11.18 after the filing deadline provided by Section 11.43
_note: Rule text concerns charitable organization exemptions, not residence homestead exemptions; no conflict with proposed change to §11.13(b).
